cases.input: Create /jm:skill-audit-ready to inspect a skill, prepare a review doc, and decide PR readiness.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates Workflow Forge, builds a phase map with clarification, inspection, improvement, and verification, and includes frontmatter plus quality gates.
The compiler exits zero and renders frontmatter, phase map, checkpoints, quality gates, example dialogue, and validation sections.
The compiler exits zero and returns validation.valid=true with frontmatter, phase_map, checkpoints, quality_gates, and example_dialogue.

cases.input: Validate a workflow spec with only one phase.
cases.expected_behavior: The compiler exits non-zero and reports that at least two phases are required.

cases.input: Validate a workflow spec whose final phase is execution, not verification.
cases.expected_behavior: The compiler exits non-zero and reports that the final phase must be verification.

cases.input: Validate a workflow spec that includes Docker in an unscoped workflow description.
cases.expected_behavior: The compiler exits non-zero and reports the prohibited stack reference.

cases.input: Create a workflow with an agent name that is not in the local catalog.
cases.expected_behavior: The skill marks the reference as [OPEN] and asks for confirmation instead of inventing a catalog entry.

cases.input: Make me a quick task list for today.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate unless the user asks for a reusable workflow, slash command, phases, handoffs, or verification gates.
